title: lasallea walteri
intro: Lasallea walteri, also known as Walter's lasallea, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for various respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lasallea walteri include its ability to ease congestion, soothe sore throats, and provide relief from fever. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
